description: A kind of internship a student can pursue (e.g. Worship, Chaplaincy, Pastoral). Defines the required hours and how they are tracked, the requirement template, the optional backing course (credits/grade), the graduation requirement it fulfils, and an optional faculty advisor pool.

fields.description: Default total hours a student must log to complete this type. A program can override this on its graduation requirement (Program Grad Req Items → Internship Hours Required), so one type can require different hours per program.
fields.label: Default Hours Required

fields.description: Allow a student to fulfil this internship across more than one placement site.
fields.label: Allow Multi-Site

fields.description: Maximum number of placement sites a student may use (when multi-site is allowed).
fields.label: Max Sites

fields.description: How logged hours count toward the total. 'Portal Daily Log' counts immediately; '... with Supervisor Confirmation' counts only verified rows; 'Submittable Log' counts once the designated hour-log requirement is signed complete.
fields.label: Hours Tracking
fields.options:
Portal Daily Log
Portal Daily Log with Supervisor Confirmation
Submittable Log

fields.description: The graduation requirement library item this internship fulfils. A student may apply only when their active enrollment has an open requirement of this item; completion reflects back to it.
fields.label: Graduation Requirement Item

fields.description: Optional. When set, this internship carries the course's credits, grade and fees: an application enrolls the student in the course and evaluation follows the course. Leave blank for a non-credit internship.
fields.label: Backing Course

fields.description: How the internship is graded. 'Inherited from Course' requires a backing course (the course's grading scale applies). Without a course, pick Pass/Fail or Graded; the faculty advisor records the outcome on the application.
fields.label: Evaluation Model

fields.description: When on, an accepted application is assigned a faculty advisor by round-robin over the pool below (manual entry always wins).
fields.label: Auto-Assign Faculty

fields.description: Advisor pool for round-robin assignment. The slot with the most remaining capacity is picked.
fields.label: Advisor Pool

name: Internship Type
